message:
feat(core): add time_series module for compact time-series storage

Bounded ring buffer for (timestamp, value) pairs with range queries,
statistical aggregation (min/max/mean/percentile), downsampling,
merge, and rate calculation. Uses explicit timestamps for serde
compatibility. 36 inline tests + 30 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
